name: Bill Maher
bio: Bill Maher is an American comedian, political commentator, and television host known for blending stand-up with topical commentary on religion, politics, and the media. He hosted Politically Incorrect (1993-2002) and has hosted Real Time with Bill Maher on HBO since 2003, alongside a series of HBO stand-up specials beginning in the late 1980s. He is often described as a libertarian-leaning liberal and is a frequent critic of organized religion.

timeline.ev: Begins stand-up in New York comedy clubs
First appearances on the Carson and Letterman shows
Real Time with Bill Maher premieres on HBO

accolades: Long-running HBO host of Real Time (since 2003)
Record for most Emmy nominations without a win
